title: Alya San totem
description: This texture pack adds the Alya-san totem from the anime "Tokidoki Bosotto Roshia-go home, Tonari, but Alia-san" to the game. It also changes the totem's sounds, increasing its interest in the game without changing the game's style
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/574f5f34602145c1a6b1b02c0daf41674a6a4b32.gif)

This texture pack adds the **Alya-san** totem from the anime "**Tokidoki Bosotto Roshia-go home, Tonari, but Alia-san"** to the game. It also changes the totem's sounds, increasing its interest in the game without changing the game's style. 

**This uses an animated totem model, which has motion animation**
